prompt: A studio portrait of the same beautiful young woman with long wavy dark hair, straight bangs, striking blue eyes, wearing a white graphic T-shirt, a silver necklace, and a wristwatch, against a solid blue seamless background. Four different expressions: surprised with hands on cheeks, "shh" gesture with finger on lips, thoughtful pose with hands under chin, and a calm neutral pose touching her hair. Arranged in a clean 2×2 collage, soft studio lighting, centered composition, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, natural skin texture, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, high-end editorial photography, 8K.
promptEn: A studio portrait of the same beautiful young woman with long wavy dark hair, straight bangs, striking blue eyes, wearing a white graphic T-shirt, a silver necklace, and a wristwatch, against a solid blue seamless background. Four different expressions: surprised with hands on cheeks, "shh" gesture with finger on lips, thoughtful pose with hands under chin, and a calm neutral pose touching her hair. Arranged in a clean 2×2 collage, soft studio lighting, centered composition, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, natural skin texture, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, high-end editorial photography, 8K.
promptZh: 一张摄影棚人像，主体为 一位留着深色长波浪卷发、齐刘海、拥有迷人蓝眼睛的年轻美女，身穿 白色印花 T 恤，佩戴银色项链和手表，背景为 纯蓝色无缝背景。包含四种不同表情：双手托腮的惊讶表情、手指抵唇的“嘘”动作、双手托下巴的沉思姿态，以及轻触头发的平静中性表情。以简洁的 2×2 拼贴形式排列，柔和的摄影棚灯光，居中构图，照片级真实感，超精细细节，自然的皮肤纹理，85mm 镜头，浅景深，高端杂志摄影风格，8K 分辨率。
